task_completion.description: The agent successfully loaded the MRI sequences (FLAIR, T1, T1ce, T2) into the medical imaging software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface (or similar) is visible with the four MRI volumes loaded in the slice views or data module.

task_completion.description: The agent placed a ruler or measurement annotation to assess midline shift at the level of the foramen of Monro.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An axial view showing a ruler measuring the perpendicular distance from the septum pellucidum to the ideal midline.

task_completion.description: The agent placed rulers to measure the width of the ipsilateral and contralateral frontal horns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An axial view showing measurement lines spanning the width of the frontal horns of the lateral ventricles.

task_completion.description: The agent generated a JSON report containing assessments for herniation, sulcal effacement, and an overall grade.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal view showing a JSON object with keys like 'subfalcine_herniation', 'sulcal_effacement_score', and 'overall_grade' being written or reviewed.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the measurement files, the report, and captured annotated screenshots.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file browser or terminal listing showing 'mass_effect_measurements.mrk.json', 'mass_effect_report.json', and a 'screenshots' directory populated with images.

integrity.description: The agent used the software's GUI tools (e.g., Markups module) for measurements rather than estimating or using command-line scripts exclusively.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor interacting with the toolbar, placing fiducials/rulers on the image canvas.

integrity.description: The agent did not copy-paste values from the task description or an external file without performing the measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen performing the work (placing points) before entering values into the report.

integrity.description: The values entered in the report appear consistent with the visual measurements shown on screen.
integrity.visual_evidence: If a ruler on screen shows ~8mm, the report entry for that measurement should be close to 8, not a completely different number.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is BraTS2021_00000. The agent must measure midline shift (max error 4.0mm) and ventricular ratio (max error 0.2). The final grade in the report must be clinically accurate based on the images shown.
